sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40741" key="e)pirripte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιρριπτ-έον</orth>, <sense id="n40741.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must apply</tr_> a plaster, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.47</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
